title: Nik's Craftableores
description: A mod that allows you to craft ores using their corresponding items. All vanilla ores are craftable e.g. Iron ingot, Diamond, Emerald, etc.
body:
### Mod Description:

**Craftable Ores Mod**

The **Craftable Ores Mod** lets you craft all vanilla ores using their corresponding items and blocks! No more endless mining trips – now you have full control over your resources.

**Features:**
- Crafting recipes for all vanilla ores (Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Coal, etc.).

I started this project because I noticed many Minecraft players use ores as decorative blocks in their builds. I wanted to do the same and decorate my world with ores. But, like many of us Minecraft players, I didn’t want to spend endless hours gathering those ores. When I looked for a mod to craft ores and couldn’t really find one, I saw an opportunity to create something new. So, I decided to make this mod to help all of us easily craft and enjoy these beautiful blocks for decoration and creativity.

---

### Table: Crafting Materials for Vanilla Ores

| Ore Type           | Required Item                     | Required Block |
|--------------------|-----------------------------------|----------------|
| Diamond Ore        | Diamonds                         | Stone          |
| Gold Ore           | Gold Ingots / Raw Gold           | Stone          |
| Iron Ore           | Iron Ingots / Raw Iron           | Stone          |
| Copper Ore         | Copper Ingots / Raw Copper       | Stone          |
| Coal Ore           | Coal / Charcoal                  | Stone          |
| Redstone Ore       | Redstone                         | Stone          |
| Emerald Ore        | Emeralds                         | Stone          |
| Lapis Lazuli Ore   | Lapis Lazuli                     | Stone          |
| Nether Gold Ore    | Gold Nuggets                     | Netherrack     |
| Nether Quartz Ore  | Nether Quartz                    | Netherrack     |

---

### Additional:
- I highly recommend installing mods like JEI or EMI as it conveniently shows you all the recipes for this mod.
